Packaging display box check update 


 


The display unit is in good condition; each unit contains 18 pieces and features its respective "Best By" date and lot number printed directly on it. The flow wrap is also in good condition and appears securely sealed on both sides; it, too, bears the "Best By" date and lot number printed in the required location.

We are seeing higher temps on the stamp area. 

It seems like the dryer precooler and post cooler are both calling for cold air so that is coming down.

Preston Elmer

Hello all. Here is the plans for removing the tent for the concrete on S1

1.   2nd shift will enter the tent from the the construction area to sweep and mop the tent area two times on their shift.

2.  The area will be swept and than mopped up two 4 ft out side of the tent 

3.  The mop bucket will never enter the area.  It will be outside the door to the sidewalk to prevent it from being contaminated.  Only the mop will go into the construction area.  The mop head will be thrown away after its use.

4.  3rd shift will sweep and mop the area three times during their shift.

5.  1st shift will remove the tent at .  They will run out caramel, cover the equipment from the bottomer to the tunnel 2 cover, put up the wielding tarps. 

5A. They will cut the tarp of the tent leaving the tarp attached to the ground but the tent itself free to be moved into the construction area.

5B. They will remove the tape connecting the tent construction wall.  They will then push the tent into the construction area sweeping and mopping as the tent is moved into the area.

5C. They will remove the tape from the ground, again sweeping and mopping the area as the tape is removed.

5D. The hole in the construction wall will be patched by taping a tarp covering the hole 4 ft beyond the cut on all sides of the existing hole.

5E. 5D will be repeated but on the construction side of the hole.

6.  The area will be blocked off using cones and tape to prevent EE’s from using the area.

7.  The area will be mopped 3 times using the same mop head.  After the three times QA will swab the area and the mop head will be disposed 

8.  Step seven will repeat 

9.  The team will mop once and throw away the mop head.  Qa will take their swabs 

10 cones and tape will be removed and walk way will be usable 

Dakota Adair Jody Howse Justin Garner Victor Romero Sr.
